title: Oncostema monophyllos
taxonomy: Oncostema monophyllos is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, which is a large and diverse family of plants commonly known as the Phyllanthus family. This family is part of the order Malpighiales and the clade Rosidae, which includes a wide range of flowering plants. The Phyllanthaceae family is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world, with many species found in Africa, Asia, and the Pacific Islands. Oncostema monophyllos, in particular, is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant's classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the diverse Phyllanthaceae family.
